query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS revenue_allocation_records (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  allocation_period BIGINT NOT NULL,
  source_type ENUM('subscription', 'service_invoice', 'licensing_fee') NOT NULL,
  source_id INT NOT NULL,
  total_amount DECIMAL(12,2) NOT NULL,
  allocation_method ENUM('fixed_split', 'utilization_weighted', 'custom') NOT NULL,
  created_at BIGINT NOT NULL
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS revenue_allocation_details (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  allocation_id INT NOT NULL,
  recipient_type ENUM('laws_collective', 'house', 'trust', 'department') NOT NULL,
  recipient_id INT,
  department_id INT,
  amount DECIMAL(12,2) NOT NULL,
  percentage DECIMAL(5,2) NOT NULL,
  utilization_hours DECIMAL(6,2) DEFAULT 0,
  utilization_units INT DEFAULT 0,
  notes TEXT,
  created_at BIGINT NOT NULL
);
